name: Exqisite Almond Truffles
recipeIngredient: 16 ounces white baking pieces with cocoa butter
1/4 cup whipping cream and 1/4 cup coconut cream
1/3 cup whipping cream and 3 tablespoons butter
1 cup sliced almonds, toasted and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat and stir the white baking pieces with cocoa butter, whipping cream, and coconut cream (or whipping cream and butter) until melted.
2. Remove from heat and stir in toasted chopped almonds and amaretto (vanilla extract).
3. Transfer to an 8x8x2-inch baking pan; cover.
4. Freeze for 2 hours or until firm.
5. Cut the filling into 48 portions and shape each portion into a ball.
6. Place the balls on a baking sheet and freeze for 15 minutes.
7. Melt chocolate and dip the balls one at a time, placing them on waxed-paper-lined baking sheets.
8. Melt 4 ounces of white baking pieces with cocoa butter and 1 tablespoon shortening over hot water and spoon over the candies.
9. Makes 48 truffles.
